function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "claudia@helios-tax.example"
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_20__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_14__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_13__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_10__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_12__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - entity.claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’ve attached the Helios invoice dated 2026-02-10, along with the related Helios invoice set for your approval workflow.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and passes verification checklist: attachments were read and ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity email, and YAML quoting is safe. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: The outbound email record was written once; no overwrite is needed or allowed.

next_step.current_state: Task complete: processed next inbox message, created outbox resend draft with all preflight-related invoices attached, and deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after successful processing.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing a resend email draft to Claudia with the requested 2026-02-10 invoice included, plus the full related Helios invoice set attached (6 files total, ordered newest-first), then removed the inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory identity bootstrap (tree /, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system workflows before task work, used inbox-email frontmatter as canonical metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, processed all 6 preflight-listed related finance files, wrote outbound email record in 60_outbox/outbox per sending-email workflow, preserved one-write outbox discipline, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested resending Helios invoice dated 2026-02-10. Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirmed sender identity (claudia@helios-tax.example). All six preflight-related finance invoices were read and included as attachments in newest-first order in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md, satisfying completeness and outbox ordering rules. Cleanup requirement from inbox-processing-v2-update was met by deleting the processed inbox item.
completed_steps_laconic: read all 6 preflight-listed Helios invoice files
